note: Safe patch-runner scenarios, each proven by a passing test in LocalAIFactory.Reasoning.Tests (ModelDrivenRunnerTests + AgentRunnerTests). Every run is in an isolated worktree; the main repo is never mutated; no commit/push capability exists.

tasks.task: Apply a compiling patch in an isolated worktree
Reject a patch that breaks the build and roll back
Reject a patch that fails tests and roll back
Block a model-hallucinated path outside the worktree
Block a forbidden command smuggled into a script patch
Reject a write outside the worktree (sandbox escape)
Restore an edited existing file on failure
Record a build failure as experience
Emit a knowledge proposal on success (awaiting approval)
Refuse to run when the worktree is missing

result: 10/10 scenarios proven by passing tests; no main-repo mutation; rollback proven; no commit/push capability.
